testcase.name: test_email_templates_no_quote_request_admin

failure.message: AssertionError: quote_request_admin trigger should NOT exist but found: ['article_email', 'enquiry_customer', 'order_placed', 'password_reset', 'quote_request_admin', 'quote_request_customer', 'refund_processed', 'scope_request_admin', 'subscription_cancellation', 'subscription_created', 'verification'] assert 'quote_request_admin' not in ['article_email', 'enquiry_customer', 'order_placed', 'password_reset', 'quote_request_admin', 'quote_request_customer', ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter120_currency_email_refs.py:88: in test_email_templates_no_quote_request_admin assert "quote_request_admin" not in triggers, \ E AssertionError: quote_request_admin trigger should NOT exist but found: ['article_email', 'enquiry_customer', 'order_placed', 'password_reset', 'quote_request_admin', 'quote_request_customer', 'refund_processed', 'scope_request_admin', 'subscription_cancellation', 'subscription_created', 'verification'] E assert 'quote_request_admin' not in ['article_email', 'enquiry_customer', 'order_placed', 'password_reset', 'quote_request_admin', 'quote_request_customer', ...]

testcase.name: test_email_templates_no_quote_request_customer

failure.message: AssertionError: quote_request_customer trigger should NOT exist but found: ['article_email', 'enquiry_customer', 'order_placed', 'password_reset', 'quote_request_admin', 'quote_request_customer', 'refund_processed', 'scope_request_admin', 'subscription_cancellation', 'subscription_created', 'verification'] assert 'quote_request_customer' not in ['article_email', 'enquiry_customer', 'order_placed', 'password_reset', 'quote_request_admin', 'quote_request_customer', ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter120_currency_email_refs.py:98: in test_email_templates_no_quote_request_customer assert "quote_request_customer" not in triggers, \ E AssertionError: quote_request_customer trigger should NOT exist but found: ['article_email', 'enquiry_customer', 'order_placed', 'password_reset', 'quote_request_admin', 'quote_request_customer', 'refund_processed', 'scope_request_admin', 'subscription_cancellation', 'subscription_created', 'verification'] E assert 'quote_request_customer' not in ['article_email', 'enquiry_customer', 'order_placed', 'password_reset', 'quote_request_admin', 'quote_request_customer', ...]

testcase.name: test_create_article_with_ref_token
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter120_currency_email_refs.py:162: in test_create_article_with_ref_token assert res.status_code in (200, 201), f"Create article failed: {res.status_code} {res.text}" E AssertionError: Create article failed: 400 {"detail":"Invalid category"} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
